nasb.text: a person who touches any such shall be unclean until evening, and shall not eat of the holy gifts unless he has bathed his body in water.

esv.text: the person who touches such a thing shall be unclean until the evening and shall not eat of the holy things unless he has bathed his body in water.

cnv.text: 摸了這些的人，必不潔淨到晚上；如果他不用水洗身，就不可吃聖物。

ccb.text: 这人就不洁净，要到傍晚之后才能洁净。他要沐浴后才可吃圣物。
